creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Gnu-chess is already in our ports collection as games/gnuchess. 
And as it is stated in the xboard.man file, Xboard can be used standalone 
and, thus, there is no dependancy declaration required.  (Gnuchess is  
just one of those many other programs that can be used with Xboard.)
